title: Crossing Guards and Flaggers
description: Guide or control vehicular or pedestrian traffic at such places as streets, schools, railroad crossings, or construction sites.

tasks.text: Direct or escort pedestrians across streets, stopping traffic, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide or control vehicular or pedestrian traffic at such places as street and railroad crossings and construction sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor traffic flow to locate safe gaps through which pedestrians can cross streets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Communicate traffic and crossing rules and other information to students and adults.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct traffic movement or warn of hazards, using signs, flags, lanterns, and hand signals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Report unsafe behavior of children to school officials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record license numbers of vehicles disregarding traffic signals, and report infractions to appropriate authorities.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Distribute traffic control signs and markers at designated points.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Stop speeding vehicles to warn drivers of traffic laws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Learn the location and purpose of street traffic signs within assigned patrol areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discuss traffic routing plans and control-point locations with superiors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform drivers of detour routes through construction sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
